These commands should only do exactly what they say they do and - * should only assume what the comments say they should assume. These commands - * can be used within your own tests and will be used by the machine grading - * system to test your application. It is therefore incredibly important you do - * not change the behavior of these commands or the assumptions they make. + * Custom commands for M3ssag1n8 application testing. * - * Each command is likely to only be 2-3 lines of code that calls chained Cypress - * commands. If you find yourself writing a lot of code in a command, you may - * want to ask for help or reconsider the structure of your application. - * - * Note that Cypress cannot "get" or "find" custom elements. However, as long as - * the shadow DOM is created as "open", it can search within the shadow DOM. If - * you need to return a custom element, you can "find" an element within the - * shadow DOM and use ".parent()" as needed to return the custom element. + * All commands use IDs/selectors that match elements in the component + * shadow DOMs. The cypress config has includeShadowDom: true so Cypress + * automatically pierces shadow roots. */ /** * Login using given username. - * * Assumes that no one is currently logged in. - * - * @param username Username to login with. */ Cypress.Commands.add("login", (username: string) => { - // Cypress code to login. + cy.get("#username-input").type(username); + cy.get("#login-btn").click(); }); /** * Logout the currently logged in user. - * * Assumes that a user is currently logged in. */ Cypress.Commands.add("logout", () => { - // Cypress code to logout. + cy.get("#logout-btn").click(); }); /** * Open a workspace. - * * Assumes that someone is logged in and that the workspace exists. - * - * @param workspace Name of the workspace to open. */ Cypress.Commands.add("openWorkspace", (workspace: string) => { - // Cypress code to open the workspace. + cy.get("#workspace-name-input").clear().type(workspace); + cy.get("#open-workspace-btn").click(); }); /** * Create a workspace. - * * Assumes that someone is logged in and that the workspace does not exist. - * - * @param workspace Name of the workspace to create. */ Cypress.Commands.add("createWorkspace", (workspace: string) => { - // Cypress code to create the workspace. + cy.get("#workspace-name-input").clear().type(workspace); + cy.get("#create-workspace-btn").click(); }); /** * Delete a workspace. - * * Assumes that someone is logged in and that the workspace exists. - * - * @param workspace Name of the workspace to delete. */ Cypress.Commands.add("deleteWorkspace", (workspace: string) => { - // Cypress code to delete the workspace. + cy.get("#workspace-name-input").clear().type(workspace); + cy.get("#delete-workspace-btn").click(); }); /** * Open a channel. - * * Assumes that someone is logged in, a workspace is open, and that the channel * exists in that workspace. - * - * @param channel Name of the channel to open. */ Cypress.Commands.add("openChannel", (channel: string) => { - // Cypress code to open the channel. + cy.get("#channel-name-input").clear().type(channel); + cy.get("#open-channel-btn").click(); }); /** * Create a channel. - * * Assumes that someone is logged in, a workspace is open, and that the channel * does not exist in that workspace. - * - * @param channel Name of the channel to create. */ Cypress.Commands.add("createChannel", (channel: string) => { - // Cypress code to create the channel. + cy.get("#channel-name-input").clear().type(channel); + cy.get("#create-channel-btn").click(); }); /** * Delete a channel. - * * Assumes that someone is logged in, a workspace is open, and that the channel * exists in that workspace. - * - * @param channel Name of the channel to delete. */ Cypress.Commands.add("deleteChannel", (channel: string) => { - // Cypress code to delete the channel. + cy.get("#channel-name-input").clear().type(channel); + cy.get("#delete-channel-btn").click(); }); /** * Create a post. - * * Assumes that someone is logged in, a workspace is open, and a channel is open. - * - * @param post Text of the post to create. */ Cypress.Commands.add("createPost", (post: string) => { - // Cypress code to create the post. + cy.get("#post-input").type(post); + cy.get("#post-submit-btn").click(); }); /** - * Get a post. - * + * Get a post by search text. * Assumes that someone is logged in, a workspace is open, and a channel is open. - * Also can assume the text only appears in a single post in the channel. - * The given searchText may not be the full text of the post, but the post should - * contain the searchText in its entirety. - * - * @param searchText Text that appears in the post to get. - * @returns The post element that contains the searchText. This element will - * be passed to the replyToPost and reactToPost commands, so should - * be the enclosing post element that allows those actions. + * Returns the enclosing post element. */ Cypress.Commands.add( "getPost", (searchText: string): Cypress.Chainable> => { - // Cypress code to get the post. - // Must return an element that can be used by the replyToPost and reactToPost commands. - } + return cy.contains(".post-item", searchText); + }, ); /** * Reply to a post. - * - * Assumes that someone is logged in, a workspace is open, a channel is open, and - * that the provided post exists and came from the "getPost" command. - * - * @param subject The post to reply to (from getPost). - * @param reply Text of the reply to create. + * Assumes subject is from getPost. */ Cypress.Commands.add( "replyToPost", { prevSubject: true }, (subject, reply: string) => { - // Cypress code to reply to the post. - } + cy.wrap(subject).find('[data-action="reply"]').first().click(); + cy.get("#post-input").clear().type(reply); + cy.get("#post-submit-btn").click(); + }, ); /** * React to a post. - * - * Assumes that someone is logged in, a workspace is open, a channel is open, - * and that the provided post exists and came from the "getPost" command. - * - * @param subject The post to react to (from getPost). - * @param reaction The reaction to react with (should be one of ":smile:", - * ":frown:", ":like:", or ":celebrate:"). + * Assumes subject is from getPost. */ Cypress.Commands.add( "reactToPost", { prevSubject: true }, (subject, reaction: string) => { - // Cypress code to react to the post. - } + cy.wrap(subject).find(`[data-reaction="${reaction}"]`).first().click(); + }, ); diff --git a/html/index.html b/html/index.html index 5a74041..c03d7fb 100644 --- a/html/index.html +++ b/html/index.html @@ -1,16 +1,131 @@ - + - - COMP 318 M3ssag1n8 + + M3ssag1n8 -

      diff --git a/package-lock.json b/package-lock.json index f9e00f2..ca7813c 100644 --- a/package-lock.json +++ b/package-lock.json @@ -24,6 +24,9 @@ "rimraf": "^6.0.1", "typedoc": "^0.26.10", "typescript": "^5.6.3" + }, + "engines": { + "node": ">=20.0.0 <21.0.0" } }, "node_modules/@ampproject/remapping": { diff --git a/package.json b/package.json index 1c36958..560b93f 100644 --- a/package.json +++ b/package.json @@ -9,6 +9,7 @@ "check": "tsc", "doc": "typedoc --entryPointStrategy expand src/ types/", "format": "prettier --write html/ src/ styles/", + "prestart": "rimraf .parcel-cache", "start": "parcel html/*.html", "test": "cypress run -b chrome", "report": "nyc report" diff --git a/src/api.ts b/src/api.ts new file mode 100644 index 0000000..6796d2d --- /dev/null +++ b/src/api.ts @@ -0,0 +1,347 @@ +/** + * OwlDB API client — all HTTP/SSE calls to the database. + */ + +import { fetchEventSource } from "@microsoft/fetch-event-source"; +import { slog } from "./slog"; +import { + isAuthResponse, + isCollection, + isPostCreateResponse, + PostDoc, + nameFromPath, + Workspace, + Channel, + isPostDoc, +} from "./types"; + +declare const process: { + env: { DATABASE_HOST: string; DATABASE_PATH: string; AUTH_PATH: string }; +}; + +export const DB_HOST = process.env.DATABASE_HOST; +export const DB_PATH = process.env.DATABASE_PATH; +export const AUTH_PATH_ENV = process.env.AUTH_PATH; + +/** Full base URL for the database (ends with /). */ +export const DB_URL = `${DB_HOST}${DB_PATH}`; +/** Full URL for auth endpoint. */ +export const AUTH_URL = `${DB_HOST}${AUTH_PATH_ENV}`; + +// --------------------------------------------------------------------------- +// Auth +// --------------------------------------------------------------------------- + +/** Login with username. Returns bearer token. */ +export async function login(username: string): Promise { + const res = await fetch(AUTH_URL, { + method: "POST", + headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }, + body: JSON.stringify({ username }), + }); + if (!res.ok) { + throw new Error(`Login failed: ${res.status} ${res.statusText}`); + } + const data: unknown = await res.json(); + if (!isAuthResponse(data)) throw new Error("Invalid auth response from server"); + return data.token; +} + +/** Logout — destroys the bearer token on the server. */ +export async function logout(token: string): Promise { + const res = await fetch(AUTH_URL, { + method: "DELETE", + headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` }, + }); + if (!res.ok && res.status !== 204) { + slog.warn("Logout request failed", ["status", res.status]); + } +} + +// --------------------------------------------------------------------------- +// Workspaces +// --------------------------------------------------------------------------- + +/** List all workspaces in the database. */ +export async function listWorkspaces(token: string): Promise { + const res = await fetch(DB_URL, { + headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` }, + }); + if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Failed to list workspaces: ${res.status}`); + const data: unknown = await res.json(); + if (!isCollection(data)) { + slog.warn("Unexpected workspace listing format, treating as empty"); + return []; + } + return data.map((d) => ({ + path: d.path, + name: nameFromPath(d.path), + })); +} + +/** Create a new workspace. Throws on error (e.g., 409 conflict). */ +export async function createWorkspace(token: string, name: string): Promise { + const res = await fetch(`${DB_URL}${encodeURIComponent(name)}`, { + method: "PUT", + headers: { + Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`, + "Content-Type": "application/json", + }, + body: JSON.stringify({}), + }); + if (!res.ok) { + const msg = res.status === 409 ? "Workspace already exists" : `Error ${res.status}`; + throw new Error(msg); + } + // Create the channels/ collection inside the workspace + await fetch(`${DB_URL}${encodeURIComponent(name)}/channels/`, { + method: "PUT", + headers: { + Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`, + "Content-Type": "application/json", + }, + body: JSON.stringify({}), + }); +} + +/** Open (load) a workspace by fetching its channels. Throws if not found. */ +export async function openWorkspace(token: string, name: string): Promise { + const res = await fetch(`${DB_URL}${encodeURIComponent(name)}/channels/`, { + headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` }, + }); + if (res.status === 404) throw new Error(`Workspace "${name}" not found`); + if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Failed to open workspace: ${res.status}`); + const data: unknown = await res.json(); + if (!isCollection(data)) { + slog.warn("Unexpected channels format"); + return []; + } + return data.map((d) => ({ + path: d.path, + name: nameFromPath(d.path), + })); +} + +/** Delete a workspace. Throws if not found. */ +export async function deleteWorkspace(token: string, name: string): Promise { + const res = await fetch(`${DB_URL}${encodeURIComponent(name)}`, { + method: "DELETE", + headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` }, + }); + if (res.status === 404) throw new Error(`Workspace "${name}" not found`); + if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Failed to delete workspace: ${res.status}`); +} + +// --------------------------------------------------------------------------- +// Channels +// --------------------------------------------------------------------------- + +/** List channels in a workspace. */ +export async function listChannels(token: string, workspace: string): Promise { + const res = await fetch(`${DB_URL}${encodeURIComponent(workspace)}/channels/`, { + headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` }, + }); + if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Failed to list channels: ${res.status}`); + const data: unknown = await res.json(); + if (!isCollection(data)) return []; + return data.map((d) => ({ + path: d.path, + name: nameFromPath(d.path), + })); +} + +/** Create a new channel in a workspace. */ +export async function createChannel( + token: string, + workspace: string, + name: string, +): Promise { + const res = await fetch( + `${DB_URL}${encodeURIComponent(workspace)}/channels/${encodeURIComponent(name)}`, + { + method: "PUT", + headers: { + Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`, + "Content-Type": "application/json", + }, + body: JSON.stringify({}), + }, + ); + if (!res.ok) { + const msg = res.status === 409 ? "Channel already exists" : `Error ${res.status}`; + throw new Error(msg); + } + // Create posts/ collection + await fetch( + `${DB_URL}${encodeURIComponent(workspace)}/channels/${encodeURIComponent(name)}/posts/`, + { + method: "PUT", + headers: { + Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`, + "Content-Type": "application/json", + }, + body: JSON.stringify({}), + }, + ); +} + +/** Open a channel — verifies it exists and returns a confirmation. */ +export async function openChannel( + token: string, + workspace: string, + name: string, +): Promise { + const res = await fetch( + `${DB_URL}${encodeURIComponent(workspace)}/channels/${encodeURIComponent(name)}/posts/`, + { + headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` }, + }, + ); + if (res.status === 404) throw new Error(`Channel "${name}" not found`); + if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Failed to open channel: ${res.status}`); +} + +/** Delete a channel from a workspace. */ +export async function deleteChannel( + token: string, + workspace: string, + name: string, +): Promise { + const res = await fetch( + `${DB_URL}${encodeURIComponent(workspace)}/channels/${encodeURIComponent(name)}`, + { + method: "DELETE", + headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` }, + }, + ); + if (res.status === 404) throw new Error(`Channel "${name}" not found`); + if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Failed to delete channel: ${res.status}`); +} + +// --------------------------------------------------------------------------- +// Posts +// --------------------------------------------------------------------------- + +/** Create a post in a channel. Returns the created document URI. */ +export async function createPost( + token: string, + workspace: string, + channel: string, + msg: string, + parent: string = "", +): Promise { + const res = await fetch( + `${DB_URL}${encodeURIComponent(workspace)}/channels/${encodeURIComponent(channel)}/posts/`, + { + method: "POST", + headers: { + Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`, + "Content-Type": "application/json", + }, + body: JSON.stringify({ msg, parent }), + }, + ); + if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Failed to create post: ${res.status}`); + const data: unknown = await res.json(); + if (!isPostCreateResponse(data)) throw new Error("Invalid post create response"); + return data.uri; +} + +/** Update a post's reactions via PATCH. */ +export async function patchReactions( + token: string, + postFullPath: string, + reactions: Record, +): Promise { + const url = `${DB_HOST}${postFullPath}`; + const res = await fetch(url, { + method: "PATCH", + headers: { + Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`, + "Content-Type": "application/json", + }, + body: JSON.stringify([ + { op: "ObjectAdd", path: "/reactions", value: reactions }, + ]), + }); + if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Failed to patch reactions: ${res.status}`); +} + +// --------------------------------------------------------------------------- +// SSE subscription +// --------------------------------------------------------------------------- + +export interface SSEPostEvent { + eventType: "put" | "patch" | "delete"; + path: string; + doc?: PostDoc; + meta?: { createdAt: string; createdBy: string }; +} + +/** + * Subscribe to live post updates via Server-Sent Events. + * Calls onPost for each received post event. + * Returns an AbortController you can use to unsubscribe. + */ +export function subscribeToChannel( + token: string, + workspace: string, + channel: string, + onPost: (event: SSEPostEvent) => void, + onError?: (err: unknown) => void, +): AbortController { + const controller = new AbortController(); + const url = `${DB_URL}${encodeURIComponent(workspace)}/channels/${encodeURIComponent(channel)}/posts/?mode=subscribe`; + + fetchEventSource(url, { + headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` }, + signal: controller.signal, + onmessage(ev) { + try { + const data: unknown = JSON.parse(ev.data); + if (typeof data !== "object" || data === null) return; + + const d = data as Record; + const path = typeof d["path"] === "string" ? d["path"] : ""; + const rawDoc = d["doc"]; + const rawMeta = d["meta"]; + + // OwlDB sends event type "update" (initial snapshot + patches) or "delete" + let eventType: "put" | "patch" | "delete" = "put"; + if (ev.event === "delete") { + eventType = "delete"; + } else { + // "update" covers both initial snapshot and live updates + eventType = "put"; + } + + const doc = isPostDoc(rawDoc) ? rawDoc : undefined; + const meta = + rawMeta && + typeof rawMeta === "object" && + "createdAt" in rawMeta && + "createdBy" in rawMeta + ? { + createdAt: String((rawMeta as Record)["createdAt"]), + createdBy: String((rawMeta as Record)["createdBy"]), + } + : undefined; + + onPost({ eventType, path, doc, meta }); + } catch (e) { + slog.warn("Failed to parse SSE event", ["error", e]); + } + }, + onerror(err) { + slog.warn("SSE error", ["err", err]); + if (onError) onError(err); + throw err; // stop retrying on persistent error + }, + }).catch((e) => { + // Absorb AbortError from controller.abort() + if (e instanceof DOMException && e.name === "AbortError") return; + slog.warn("SSE connection error", ["error", e]); + }); + + return controller; +} diff --git a/src/components/channel-panel.ts b/src/components/channel-panel.ts new file mode 100644 index 0000000..748679d --- /dev/null +++ b/src/components/channel-panel.ts @@ -0,0 +1,318 @@ +/** + * ChannelPanel web component — lists channels for the open workspace, + * handles create/open/delete. + */ + +import { + listChannels, + createChannel as apiCreateChannel, + openChannel as apiOpenChannel, + deleteChannel as apiDeleteChannel, +} from "../api"; +import { store, closeChannel, startChannelSubscription } from "../state"; + +export class ChannelPanel extends HTMLElement { + private shadow: ShadowRoot; + + constructor() { + super(); + this.shadow = this.attachShadow({ mode: "open" }); + } + + connectedCallback(): void { + this.render(); + this.bindEvents(); + store.addEventListener("state-change", () => this.onStateChange()); + } + + disconnectedCallback(): void { + store.removeEventListener("state-change", () => this.onStateChange()); + } + + private render(): void { + this.shadow.innerHTML = ` + + +

      Channels

      +
      + +
      + +
      + + + +
      + +
      + +
      + + +
      + +
        + `; + } + + private bindEvents(): void { + const nameInput = this.shadow.getElementById("channel-name-input") as HTMLInputElement; + const openBtn = this.shadow.getElementById("open-channel-btn") as HTMLButtonElement; + const createBtn = this.shadow.getElementById("create-channel-btn") as HTMLButtonElement; + const deleteBtn = this.shadow.getElementById("delete-channel-btn") as HTMLButtonElement; + const refreshBtn = this.shadow.getElementById("refresh-channels-btn") as HTMLButtonElement; + const dismissBtn = this.shadow.getElementById("ch-dismiss-error") as HTMLButtonElement; + + openBtn.addEventListener("click", () => this.handleOpen(nameInput.value.trim())); + createBtn.addEventListener("click", () => this.handleCreate(nameInput.value.trim())); + deleteBtn.addEventListener("click", () => this.handleDelete(nameInput.value.trim())); + refreshBtn.addEventListener("click", () => this.handleRefresh()); + dismissBtn.addEventListener("click", () => this.clearError()); + + nameInput.addEventListener("keydown", (e: KeyboardEvent) => { + if (e.key === "Enter") this.handleOpen(nameInput.value.trim()); + }); + } + + private showError(msg: string): void { + const errDiv = this.shadow.getElementById("ch-error")!; + const errMsg = this.shadow.getElementById("ch-error-msg")!; + errDiv.classList.remove("hidden"); + errMsg.textContent = msg; + } + + private clearError(): void { + this.shadow.getElementById("ch-error")!.classList.add("hidden"); + } + + private async handleOpen(name: string): Promise { + if (!name) return; + this.clearError(); + const { token, currentWorkspace } = store.state; + if (!token || !currentWorkspace) return; + try { + await apiOpenChannel(token, currentWorkspace, name); + closeChannel(); + store.setState({ currentChannel: name }); + startChannelSubscription(currentWorkspace, name); + } catch (e) { + this.showError(e instanceof Error ? e.message : "Error opening channel"); + } + } + + private async handleCreate(name: string): Promise { + if (!name) return; + this.clearError(); + const { token, currentWorkspace } = store.state; + if (!token || !currentWorkspace) return; + try { + await apiCreateChannel(token, currentWorkspace, name); + // Auto-open after creation + closeChannel(); + store.setState({ currentChannel: name }); + startChannelSubscription(currentWorkspace, name); + // Refresh channels list + await this.loadChannels(); + } catch (e) { + this.showError(e instanceof Error ? e.message : "Error creating channel"); + } + } + + private async handleDelete(name: string): Promise { + if (!name) return; + this.clearError(); + const { token, currentWorkspace } = store.state; + if (!token || !currentWorkspace) return; + try { + await apiDeleteChannel(token, currentWorkspace, name); + closeChannel(); + await this.loadChannels(); + } catch (e) { + this.showError(e instanceof Error ? e.message : "Error deleting channel"); + } + } + + private async handleRefresh(): Promise { + this.clearError(); + await this.loadChannels(); + } + + async loadChannels(): Promise { + const { token, currentWorkspace } = store.state; + if (!token || !currentWorkspace) return; + try { + const channels = await listChannels(token, currentWorkspace); + store.setState({ channels }); + } catch (e) { + this.showError(e instanceof Error ? e.message : "Error loading channels"); + } + } + + private onStateChange(): void { + const { currentWorkspace, channels, currentChannel } = store.state; + + // Show/hide based on workspace + if (!currentWorkspace) { + this.setAttribute("hidden", ""); + } else { + this.removeAttribute("hidden"); + } + + // Update workspace label + const label = this.shadow.getElementById("workspace-name-label")!; + label.textContent = currentWorkspace ?? ""; + + // Update channel list + const list = this.shadow.getElementById("channel-list")!; + list.innerHTML = ""; + for (const ch of channels) { + const li = document.createElement("li"); + li.className = "channel-item" + (ch.name === currentChannel ? " active" : ""); + li.textContent = ch.name; + li.setAttribute("title", ch.name); + li.addEventListener("click", () => { + const input = this.shadow.getElementById("channel-name-input") as HTMLInputElement; + input.value = ch.name; + this.handleOpen(ch.name); + }); + list.appendChild(li); + } + } +} + +customElements.define("channel-panel", ChannelPanel); diff --git a/src/components/login-modal.ts b/src/components/login-modal.ts new file mode 100644 index 0000000..06afd29 --- /dev/null +++ b/src/components/login-modal.ts @@ -0,0 +1,164 @@ +/** + * LoginModal web component — modal dialog for user authentication. + * Shows on page load; hides after successful login. + * Re-shows when the user logs out. + */ + +import { login } from "../api"; +import { store } from "../state"; + +export class LoginModal extends HTMLElement { + private shadow: ShadowRoot; + + constructor() { + super(); + this.shadow = this.attachShadow({ mode: "open" }); + } + + connectedCallback(): void { + this.render(); + this.bindEvents(); + this.show(); + } + + private render(): void { + this.shadow.innerHTML = ` + + +
        +
        +

        Welcome to M3ssag1n8

        + + +

        +
        +
        + `; + } + + private bindEvents(): void { + const input = this.shadow.getElementById("username-input") as HTMLInputElement; + const btn = this.shadow.getElementById("login-btn") as HTMLButtonElement; + const errorEl = this.shadow.getElementById("login-error") as HTMLParagraphElement; + + const doLogin = async (): Promise => { + const username = input.value.trim(); + if (!username) { + errorEl.textContent = "Please enter a username."; + return; + } + errorEl.textContent = ""; + btn.disabled = true; + try { + const token = await login(username); + store.setState({ username, token }); + this.hide(); + // Dispatch login event so the app can refresh workspaces + this.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent("user-logged-in", { bubbles: true })); + } catch (e) { + errorEl.textContent = e instanceof Error ? e.message : "Login failed"; + } finally { + btn.disabled = false; + } + }; + + btn.addEventListener("click", doLogin); + input.addEventListener("keydown", (e: KeyboardEvent) => { + if (e.key === "Enter") doLogin();
